description: Turkish Tech Lab (Turkish Technology) provides aviation-focused technology products and digital transformation solutions for airlines and related operations. Its public site highlights passenger, maintenance, flight operations, cargo, and corporate software offerings.
summary: turkishtechlab.com exposes a public Turkish Airlines MCP server at `https://mcp-app.turkishtechlab.com/mcp` and public npm-distributed Takeoff Spar UI packages with installation docs; no public REST/GraphQL APIs or authenticated developer credentials were found.
